## Repository files navigation

# OpenClaw Mission Control

[Permalink: OpenClaw Mission Control](https://github.com/abhi1693/openclaw-mission-control?tab=readme-ov-file#openclaw-mission-control)

[![CI](https://github.com/abhi1693/openclaw-mission-control/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/abhi1693/openclaw-mission-control/actions/workflows/ci.yml)[![Static Badge](https://camo.githubusercontent.)](https://camo.githubusercontent.)

OpenClaw Mission Control is the centralized operations and governance platform for running OpenClaw across teams and organizations, with unified visibility, approval controls, and gateway-aware orchestration.
It gives operators a single interface for work orchestration, agent and gateway management, approval-driven governance, and API-backed automation.

[![Mission Control dashboard](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/5083532/549941627-49a3c823-6aaf-4c56-8328-fb1485ee940f.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..4-U15WK9QmL6zfzn6WBFbdO_EAYV9iOxpNk8ISLfKHQ)](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/5083532/549941627-49a3c823-6aaf-4c56-8328-fb1485ee940f.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..4-U15WK9QmL6zfzn6WBFbdO_EAYV9iOxpNk8ISLfKHQ)  [![image](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/5083532/549941710-2bfee13a-3dab-4f4a-9135-e47bb6949dcf.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Qfbb93FbNS1MJGFQnI5tvMogfavSYxRri-j1bcErBOU)](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/5083532/549941710-2bfee13a-3dab-4f4a-9135-e47bb6949dcf.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..Qfbb93FbNS1MJGFQnI5tvMogfavSYxRri-j1bcErBOU)  [![image](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/5083532/549941794-84c2e867-5dc7-4a36-9290-e29179d2a659.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..1X_fDC5mRAazREBRVfkgbGr-KxnUXEnLEIq5y5omYSY)](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/5083532/549941794-84c2e867-5dc7-4a36-9290-e29179d2a659.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..1X_fDC5mRAazREBRVfkgbGr-KxnUXEnLEIq5y5omYSY)  [![image](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/5083532/549941873-3bbd825c-9969-4bbf-bf31-987f9168f370.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..3JY5e7o-vmt5s1KNrXwlN4BMKMCc9OwFsve_94YfHLk)](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/5083532/549941873-3bbd825c-9969-4bbf-bf31-987f9168f370.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..3JY5e7o-vmt5s1KNrXwlN4BMKMCc9OwFsve_94YfHLk)  [![image](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/5083532/549941909-eea09632-60e4-4d6d-9e6e-bdfa0ac97630.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..2S4m5wcoPlppcS06XgrSfgeKmNrvtxiIkuArxeP2KUM)](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/5083532/549941909-eea09632-60e4-4d6d-9e6e-bdfa0ac97630.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..2S4m5wcoPlppcS06XgrSfgeKmNrvtxiIkuArxeP2KUM)

## Platform overview

[Permalink: Platform overview](https://github.com/abhi1693/openclaw-mission-control?tab=readme-ov-file#platform-overview)

Mission Control is designed to be the day-to-day operations surface for OpenClaw.
Instead of splitting work across multiple tools, teams can plan, execute, review, and audit activity in one system.

Core operational areas:

- Work orchestration: manage organizations, board groups, boards, tasks, and tags.
- Agent operations: create, inspect, and manage agent lifecycle from a unified control surface.
- Governance and approvals: route sensitive actions through explicit approval flows.
- Gateway management: connect and operate gateway integrations for distributed environments.
- Activity visibility: review a timeline of system actions for faster debugging and accountability.
- API-first model: support both web workflows and automation clients from the same platform.

## Use cases

[Permalink: Use cases](https://github.com/abhi1693/openclaw-mission-control?tab=readme-ov-file#use-cases)

- Multi-team agent operations: run multiple boards and board groups across organizations from a single control plane.
- Human-in-the-loop execution: require approvals before sensitive actions and keep decision trails attached to work.
- Distributed runtime control: connect gateways and operate remote execution environments without changing operator workflow.
- Audit and incident review: use activity history to reconstruct what happened, when it happened, and who initiated it.
- API-backed process integration: connect internal workflows and automation clients to the same operational model used in the UI.

## What makes Mission Control different

[Permalink: What makes Mission Control different](https://github.com/abhi1693/openclaw-mission-control?tab=readme-ov-file#what-makes-mission-control-different)

- Operations-first design: built for running agent work reliably, not just creating tasks.
- Governance built in: approvals, auth modes, and clear control boundaries are first-class.
- Gateway-aware orchestration: built to operate both local and connected runtime environments.
- Unified UI and API model: operators and automation act on the same objects and lifecycle.
- Team-scale structure: organizations, board groups, boards, tasks, tags, and users in one system of record.

## Who it is for

[Permalink: Who it is for](https://github.com/abhi1693/openclaw-mission-control?tab=readme-ov-file#who-it-is-for)

- Platform teams running OpenClaw in self-hosted or internal environments.
- Operations and engineering teams that need clear approval and auditability controls.
- Organizations that want API-accessible operations without losing a usable web UI.

## Get started in minutes

[Permalink: Get started in minutes](https://github.com/abhi1693/openclaw-mission-control?tab=readme-ov-file#get-started-in-minutes)

### Option A: One-command production-style bootstrap

[Permalink: Option A: One-command production-style bootstrap](https://github.com/abhi1693/openclaw-mission-control?tab=readme-ov-file#option-a-one-command-production-style-bootstrap)

If you haven't cloned the repo yet, you can run the installer in one line:

```
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/abhi1693/openclaw-mission-control/master/install.sh | bash
```

This clones the repository into `./openclaw-mission-control` if no local checkout is found in your current directory.

If you already cloned the repo:

```
./install.sh
```

The installer is interactive and will:

- Ask for deployment mode (`docker` or `local`).
- Install missing system dependencies when possible.
- Generate and configure environment files.
- Bootstrap and start the selected deployment mode.

Installer support matrix: [`docs/installer-support.md`](https://github.com/abhi1693/openclaw-mission-control/blob/master/docs/installer-support.md)

### Option B: Manual setup

[Permalink: Option B: Manual setup](https://github.com/abhi1693/openclaw-mission-control?tab=readme-ov-file#option-b-manual-setup)

### Prerequisites

[Permalink: Prerequisites](https://github.com/abhi1693/openclaw-mission-control?tab=readme-ov-file#prerequisites)

- **Supported platforms**: Linux and macOS. On macOS, Docker mode requires [Docker Desktop](https://www.docker.com/products/docker-desktop/); local mode requires [Homebrew](https://brew.sh/) and Node.js 22+.
- Docker Engine
- Docker Compose v2 (`docker compose`)

### 1\. Configure environment

[Permalink: 1. Configure environment](https://github.com/abhi1693/openclaw-mission-control?tab=readme-ov-file#1-configure-environment)

```
cp .env.example .env
```

Before startup:

- Set `LOCAL_AUTH_TOKEN` to a non-placeholder value (minimum 50 characters) when `AUTH_MODE=local`.
- `NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=auto` (default) resolves to `http(s)://<current-host>:8000`.

  - Set an explicit URL when your API is behind a reverse proxy or non-default port.

### 2\. Start Mission Control

[Permalink: 2. Start Mission Control](https://github.com/abhi1693/openclaw-mission-control?tab=readme-ov-file#2-start-mission-control)

```
docker compose -f compose.yml --env-file .env up -d --build
```

### 3\. Open the application

[Permalink: 3. Open the application](https://github.com/abhi1693/openclaw-mission-control?tab=readme-ov-file#3-open-the-application)

- Mission Control UI: [http://localhost:3000](http://localhost:3000/)
- Backend health: [http://localhost:8000/healthz](http://localhost:8000/healthz)

### 4\. Stop the stack

[Permalink: 4. Stop the stack](https://github.com/abhi1693/openclaw-mission-control?tab=readme-ov-file#4-stop-the-stack)

```
docker compose -f compose.yml --env-file .env down
```

## Authentication

[Permalink: Authentication](https://github.com/abhi1693/openclaw-mission-control?tab=readme-ov-file#authentication)

Mission Control supports two authentication modes:

- `local`: shared bearer token mode (default for self-hosted use)
- `clerk`: Clerk JWT mode

Environment templates:

- Root: [`.env.example`](https://github.com/abhi1693/openclaw-mission-control/blob/master/.env.example)
- Backend: [`backend/.env.example`](https://github.com/abhi1693/openclaw-mission-control/blob/master/backend/.env.example)
- Frontend: [`frontend/.env.example`](https://github.com/abhi1693/openclaw-mission-control/blob/master/frontend/.env.example)

## Documentation

[Permalink: Documentation](https://github.com/abhi1693/openclaw-mission-control?tab=readme-ov-file#documentation)

Complete guides for deployment, production, troubleshooting, and testing are in [`/docs`](https://github.com/abhi1693/openclaw-mission-control/blob/master/docs).

## Project status

[Permalink: Project status](https://github.com/abhi1693/openclaw-mission-control?tab=readme-ov-file#project-status)

Mission Control is under active development.

- Features and APIs may change between releases.
- Validate and harden your configuration before production use.

## Contributing

[Permalink: Contributing](https://github.com/abhi1693/openclaw-mission-control?tab=readme-ov-file#contributing)

Issues and pull requests are welcome.

## About

AI Agent Orchestration Dashboard - Manage AI agents, assign tasks, and coordinate multi-agent collaboration via OpenClaw Gateway.


### Topics
